mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(L.reg_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') AS monthly, -- reg_date를 ORDER_DATE로 변경 SUM(D.price * D.quantity) AS total_sales FROM order_detail D INNER JOIN order_list_map L ON D.order_id = L.order_id WHERE (L.reg_DATE BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -5), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(SYSDATE)) OR (L.reg_DATE BETWEEN TRUNC(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -17), 'MM') AND LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12))) GROUP BY TO_CHAR(L.reg_DATE, 'YYYY-MM') ORDER BY monthly ASC
